Privacy Policy

Last updated: 18 July 2026

Aquality Plumbing ("we", "us" or "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you use our website or contact form.

What data we collect

When you complete the contact form on our website, we collect:

  • Your name
  • Phone number
  • Email address (if provided)
  • The service you are interested in
  • The message you send us

How we use your data

We use your data only to respond to your enquiry, provide a quote, arrange a visit or carry out plumbing, bathroom or tiling work. We do not use your data for marketing unless you explicitly ask us to.

How we store your data

Your enquiry is sent securely to our customer relationship management (CRM) system, which is hosted by Project Forward using Firebase. Data is stored within UK/European data centres and is only accessed by Aquality Plumbing.

Cookies

This website does not use tracking or analytics cookies. We only use the minimum technical data required to serve the website securely via Firebase Hosting.

Third-party services

We use Firebase (Google Cloud) for secure hosting and form submission handling. We do not share your data with advertisers or unrelated third parties.

Your rights

Under UK GDPR, you have the right to:

  • Request a copy of the data we hold about you
  • Ask us to correct or delete your data
  • Object to how we use your data

Contact us about your data

If you have any questions or want to exercise your rights, contact us:

  • Phone: 07481 931931
  • Email: paolo.aquality@gmail.com
  • Address: 1 Elton Lane, Bristol, BS7 8AB

Reliable plumbing, bathroom fitting and tiling across Bristol.
